site.name: SmileCare Dental Clinic
site.description: Family-friendly dental care with online booking, gentle treatment, and a team focused on healthy smiles for every age.

location.address: 123 Commonwealth Ave, Brgy. Holy Spirit, Quezon City

hours.summary: Mon–Sat 9 AM–5 PM, Sunday by appointment

paragraphs: We are a neighborhood dental clinic built around comfort, clarity, and consistent care. From check-ups to cosmetic work, our team explains every step in plain language.
Our reception desk confirms appointments quickly, and patients can book or reschedule online anytime. We treat families, professionals, and first-time visitors with the same attention.
Whether you need a cleaning, filling, braces consult, or emergency visit, we focus on gentle treatment and long-term oral health.
copy.short: Professional dental care with online booking and friendly staff.
copy.medium: Book appointments online, get email confirmations, and visit a clinic designed for busy families and working professionals.
copy.long: Our clinic combines modern dentistry with a warm, local feel. Online booking, clear pricing conversations, and a staff dashboard keep visits organized from first call to follow-up.
copy.quote: The team was patient, thorough, and made my first visit easy. Booking online saved me time and the reminders were helpful.

team.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
team.bio: General and cosmetic dentistry with a focus on patient comfort and clear treatment plans.

team.name: Dr. Raj Patel
team.bio: Braces and aligner consultations for teens and adults.

team.name: Maria Lopez
team.bio: Preventive care, cleanings, and oral health education.

testimonials.text: Booking was easy and the staff confirmed my slot the same day. Very professional visit.
testimonials.author: Jennifer M.

testimonials.text: Clean clinic, friendly team, and they explained my options without pressure.
testimonials.author: David K.

testimonials.text: My kids actually look forward to their check-ups now. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: Priya S.
